title: Howdy Contestants!
date: We just pushed a small client patch to address some of the issues you have reported to us (and a huge thanks as always).
summary: Read the notes below! *See you in the Arena* <:orangelove:1448266930904371230>

title: This time, the gameshow is going interplanetary!
summary: Our generous sponsor, **COMETA**, welcomes you to **GALAXY ESTATES**, the new Arena out of this world! Enjoy your stay in the resort, make use of the speed tunnel and the anti-gravity columns, and tear it all down THE FINALS style! Play it on **Cashout, Ranked Cashout, Quick Cash, Team Deathmatch**, as well as **Head-2-Head & Final Round** in Private matches. And we've added a dedicated Cashout queue for the first week so you can drop into Galaxy Estates anytime, every time. **⚔️ Melee rework** Reworking the melee combat system from the ground up has been one of our goals for this season. Melee has had two core problems we wanted to solve: we want it to be a **viable style of play with a fair chance to win matches**, and we want to make sure **it's not frustrating for those on the receiving end**. We can’t wait to hear your feedback **🤖 Cashout Bot Mode** Select Cashout Bots from the play screen and queue solo, as a party of up to three, or matchmake to team up with other players and **take on the bots** together. These bot opponents are the real deal, and the best place to jump back in the action or try new tricks. Available in **Monaco, Bernal, Kyoto, Las Vegas and SYS$Horizon** for now, this is just the start as we plan to extend Bot functionality and support to more game modes, Arenas, and items. These bots are in beta so make sure to share your experiences with the team! **And more!** QoL improvements, new onboarding, balance changes, Season 11 has even more changes for you to play! **Check out the full Patch notes for Season 11:** See you in the Arena!

title: There are some ground rules to follow... But when it all falls apart... *that's when it gets good!*
summary: - Bots in Cashout - New Arena: GALAXY ESTATES - QoL improvements, New Onboarding, *and more!* **Join us TOMORROW at <t:1783600200:t> for the Season 11 Reveal & Launch!**

title: Take a deep dive into Season 11's reworked Melee combat system with Design Director on THE FINALS: Matt Lowe!
date: And we have another teaser coming a bit later today as well.. 👀

title: Heyo Contestants!
date: The XP Feast is still live to help you finish these last Battle Pass pages, while the Sponsor Showdown remains the best Arena for Contestants to show off to their supporters!
summary: In the meantime, Season 11 is right around the corner, and we can’t wait to start sharing more very, very soon™ As for today’s store update, it sure is warm in the Arena! Get the Flamingle and Floral State Tops to flex those digital guns and show off your suntan. We’ve also brought back some 4th of July bundles alongside the brand new Fourth of Mayhem Set for the Thermal Bore. Make an impact, and make it spark! If you are not already following the The Grand Major 2026 Online Series, what are you doing? The stage is set, the crowd is cheering, and the next big storyline is about to be written! 3 regions, 3 battles for the top spot, and you could join them too if you sign up to the next Cycle tournament. Check out the full patch notes here: SEE YOU IN THE ARENA! <:namaheart:1107969312452526180> @Game Updates

title: Heyo Contestants!
date: Show must go on as both the Sponsor Showdown, the XP Feast Event and Respec Order 2.0 are still underway!
summary: Try out this experimental World Tour stop and have fun playing inventive Light and Heavy archetypes, with modified health, speed, and weapons. We welcome your feedback directly on our Discord server. Give it a shot! As for the Store, bullets are fended in style with the MaidenPlate Top! Built to improve your survivability in the Arena without sacrificing your sense of fashion. *Note: The Glow Getter Charm is currently missing from the Luminous Riot Set but will be added as soon as possible.* Check out the Patchnotes here: See you in the Arena! <:namaheart:1107969312452526180> @Game Updates

title: Heyo Contestants!
summary: Respec Order is back in its 2.0 form, with new changes for you to try. Test out health and speed changes, and tell us what you think! You can check all the details of this special World Tour stop in our Respec Order 2.0 blog - and if you'd like to leave feedback, the <#1494276420250107914> feedback channel is open again! And for you, Contestants, Sponsor Showdown is also live, putting the likes of ALFA ACTA and ISEUL-T in a fierce competition for fame. Rack up points for the sponsor repping you every time you play! Winner takes it all (Sponsor branded swag) Twitch Drops are in with three new Greenroom Glitch weapons. Check your favorite THE FINALS Streamer with drops enabled, watch for 1, 2, and 4 hours, and earn those prizes! As we get closer to the end of the season, the Bonus XP Feast event will help you out for some late grinding. Now and until the end of Season 10, earn up to 200% XP for Daily Contracts and up to 150% extra XP and Fans for gameplay! Along with our store update, we also have some balance changes just in. Check out the full patch notes here👇 See you in the Arena! <:namaheart:1107969312452526180> @Game Updates

title: Heyo Contestants!
date: Respec Order is back to World Tour tomorrow for some more experimentation! 🧪
summary: In our 10.3 update we ran a World Tour Stop called Respec Order to test out some new core balance values for health and speed. In 10.12, Respec Order will be returning for two weeks with additional changes to allow for more detailed testing. But first, we'll like to explain what we learned from that first test, what we've changed for the new one, and where these changes might be going in the future. Check out our blogpost by Design Director Matt Lowe 👇 See you in the Arena! <:namaheart:1107969312452526180> @Game Updates

title: Heyo Contestants!
date: We’re kicking off this week with new sets in the store, alongside a special sale on some items, brought to you by OSPUZE!
summary: See you in the Arena! <:namaheart:1107969312452526180> @Game Updates

title: Heyo Contestants!
date: ÖRF is here to take over this week’s Store Update, bringing the shenanigans in the Arena up to new heights! <:orf:1243807483722596412>
summary: From Chaos trading cards to the almighty WÖRFy Knight armor, it’s time to make your pals proud while you are wearing the colors of friendship! Beat the competition black and blue. Check out our store update here: See you in the Arena! <:namaheart:1107969312452526180> @Game Updates

title: Heyo Contestants! 🫶
date: Welcome to a new week packed full of goodies, Contestants, courtesy of ALFA ACTA <:alfaacta:1349774128600584212>
summary: The classic **World Tour event: Risk & Reward** is making a comeback, this time taking the battle to Team Deathmatch. Earn extra cash depending on which weapon and gadget you decide to use. Your loadout matters, so are you ready to step out of your comfort zone for some extra cash? ALFA ACTA is proud to present its newest **Safehouse Standard Event Pass**. This includes 16 fresh items, including the Deadbolt Directive outfit, inspired by the one and only Loretta “Deadbolt” McJohnson herself. The best of the ALFA ACTA’s home-defense line-up at one incredible price, as seen on the Nuclear Family channel. Bright and colorful, the Stream Tangerine Set is back on for more **Twitch Drops**! Looking to get your hands on it? Simply watch anyone playing THE FINALS with Drops Enabled to get it for free! From 6 feet under to the top of the podium, the Cut To The Bone Set gives all Contestants the chance to take care of any unfinished business, when outlasting the competition is already done. Take a look at the **Store** to grab your chance at eternal virtual life! We’ve also squashed a long list of **bugs** and brought a couple **balance tweaks** for you. **Ready to dive in? Read it all about it below!👇 See you in the Arena! <:namaheart:1107969312452526180> @Game Updates

title: Store Update 10.8.0
summary: 공식사이트에 공개된 Store Update 10.8.0 관련 안내입니다. 자세한 내용은 원문에서 확인하세요.

title: THE FINALS 공식사이트
summary: THE FINALS의 최신 소식, 시즌 정보, 이벤트, 게임 모드 안내를 확인할 수 있는 공식사이트입니다. 자세한 내용은 공식사이트에서 확인하세요.

title: 패치노트 안내 예시
summary: 공식사이트에 공개된 패치노트 안내입니다. 앱에서는 전문을 복사하지 않고 제목, 요약, 원문 링크 중심으로 제공합니다.

title: 이벤트 안내 예시
summary: 공식사이트에 공개된 이벤트 안내입니다. 자세한 내용은 공식사이트 원문에서 확인하세요.

title: 공지사항 안내 예시
summary: THE FINALS 관련 공지사항을 확인할 수 있는 공식 링크 안내입니다. 앱에서는 짧은 요약과 원문 링크만 제공합니다.

title: Embark 지원 페이지
summary: 계정, 오류, 결제, 게임 이용 관련 문제는 Embark 공식 지원 페이지에서 확인할 수 있습니다.
